show ap tag summary
AP Name                          AP Mac          Site Tag Name   Policy Tag Name   RF Tag Name     Misconfigured  Tag Source
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
AP-ALPHA 0011.2233.4455 ST_MAIN POL_VOICE RF_VOICE
AP-BRAVO 00aa.bbcc.ddee ST_BACK POL_DATA RF_DATA
AP-CHARLIE ST_CLI_ONLY POL_CLI_ONLY RF_CLI_ONLY No Static

show ap dot11 5ghz summary
